CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Continued To Oct-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Aug-06-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Joinder And Motion For Joinder To Defendants Usa Swimming And Pacific Swimming'S Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT MILPITAS AQUATIC CLUB's Motion For Joinder To Defendants Usa Swimming And Pacific Swimming'S Motion To Transfer Venue.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The joinder is granted. The matter is transferred to the Superior Court for the County of Santa Clara.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS PACIFIC SWIMMING, AND USA SWIMMING's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for change of venue is granted. This matter is transferred to the Superior Court for the County of Santa Clara.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and indicates the party responsible for paying the transfer fees.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
